zh.lifeSummary: 當Warin de Raleigh於大約1255年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特內特萊可姆時，他的父親Simon de Raleigh33歲，母親Ela Reigny19歲。他於1265年與Joanna le Boteler在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1294年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特阿生頓享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Warin de Raleigh于大约1255年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特內特萊可姆时，他的父亲Simon de Raleigh33岁，母亲Ela Reigny19岁。他于1265年与Joanna le Boteler在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1294年在英国英格兰薩默塞特阿生頓享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Raleigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Raleigh (House) in Pilton (Devon), recorded as Radeleia in 1086 and Rawlegh in 1535. The placename probably derives from Old English rǣge ‘roe deer’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The English explorer Sir Walter Raleigh (1554–1618) was born in Hayes Barton, Devon, into a family of Devon gentry. He was related to most of the West Country's important families, including that of Sir Francis Drake. His half-brother was the explorer Sir Humphrey Gilbert. In 1578 Raleigh was granted a patent to explore and colonize “unknown lands” in America. In the 1580s he was granted extensive estates in Munster (Ireland), in reward for his suppression of the Desmond Rebellions.

variants.name: Rawleigh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Orlo.
English: variant of   Raleigh  , reflecting a common pronunciation.

variants.name: Riley
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name chiefly from High Ryley in Accrington (Lancashire) and Riley in Kirkburton, which was in the manor of Wakefield (Yorkshire). In some cases the name may derive from Riley Farm in Eyam (Derbyshire), Royley in Royton (Lancashire), or Rylah in Scarcliffe (Derbyshire). The placenames all come from Old English rȳge ‘rye’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

Irish: from Ó Raghailligh ‘descendant of Raghailleach’, Old Irish Roghallach. This is the name of a chieftain family in Cavan, related to the O'Rourkes. In Anglicized form it has also been confused with Ó Raithile found in Munster, usually Anglicized as O'Rahilly or Rahilly . See O'Reilly .

nameMeanings.name: Warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

en.lifeSummary: When Warin de Raleigh was born about 1255, in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Simon de Raleigh, was 33 and his mother, Ela Reigny, was 19. He married Joanna le Boteler in 1265, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1294, in Ashington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Warin de Raleigh est né environ 1255, à Nettlecombe, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon de Raleigh, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Ela Reigny, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Joanna le Boteler en 1265, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1294, à Ashington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Warin de Raleigh um 1255 in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon de Raleigh 33 und seine Mutter Ela Reigny 19. Er hat 1265 in Somerset, England Joanna le Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1294 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Ashington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Warin de Raleigh è nato il circa 1255 nel Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Simon de Raleigh, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Ela Reigny, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Joanna le Boteler nel 1265, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1294, nel Ashington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Warin de Raleighが約1255年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトネットレコンベで生まれた時，父Simon de Raleighは33歳，母Ela Reignyは19歳であった。1265年にイギリスソメルセトでJoanna le Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1294年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトアシュイントンで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Warin de Raleigh(이)가 대략 1255년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 네틀렉브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon de Raleigh(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Ela Reigny(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1265년 영국 서머세트에서 Joanna le Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1294년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 애신그턴에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Warin de Raleigh nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Simon de Raleigh, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Ela Reigny, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanna le Boteler em 1265, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1294, em Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Warin de Raleigh родился около 1255 г. в местности неттлекомб, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Simon de Raleigh было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Ela Reigny, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna le Boteler в 1265 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1294 г. в местности ашингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Warin de Raleigh nació aproximadamente 1255, en Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Simon de Raleigh, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Ela Reigny, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Joanna le Boteler en 1265, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1294, en Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
